title: Improve claim quote span validation
problem: Rejected claims are missing required quote spans.
acceptance_criteria: Claims without quote spans are rejected with machine-readable reasons.
Accepted claims always include primary quote spans.
non_goals: Do not broaden claim extraction to live web sources.
rejection_reason: Duplicate: missing_quote_span validation and GT02 already implemented; evidence is intentional fixture rejection per pre-ticket-048 audit.
